subcodes.first_line: My dear friend, your letter has arrived, and its contents brought the utmost joy, for it was evidence of fidelity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: دوست مهربانا نامه شما رسید و از مضمون نهایت سرور حاصل گردید زیرا دلیل بر وفا
subcodes.subjects: @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
